ThingDef.label: BoS Elder Robes
ThingDef.description: Ceremonial robes worn by Brotherhood Elders. These robes symbolize the authority and responsibility that comes with leading the Brotherhood of Steel in their sacred mission to preserve technology.

ThingDef.label: BoS Appalachia Fatigues
ThingDef.description: Standard-issue Brotherhood of Steel fatigues. Made from a robust and durable material, these fatigues are worn by members of the Brotherhood during their daily operations in Appalachia.

ThingDef.label: BoS Appalachia Infantry Uniform
ThingDef.description: A pristine military dress uniform worn by Brotherhood infantry during formal occasions. The uniform bears the insignia of the Brotherhood of Steel and represents the discipline and order of the organization.

ThingDef.label: BoS Jumpsuit
ThingDef.description: A jumpsuit designed from the ground up for use in conjunction with the West Tek power armor frame. It is a form-fitting suit designed for maximum comfort and utility while operating the armor. Although it is not a requirement for operating the armor, it makes long-term use more comfortable and reduces chafing.

ThingDef.label: BoS Knight Under Armor
ThingDef.description: Standardized under-armor worn by Brotherhood Knights operating Commonwealth-era power armor. This form-fitting layer provides comfort and protection beneath power armor plating while incorporating moisture-wicking materials for extended field operations.

ThingDef.label: BoS Soldier Undersuit
ThingDef.description: Tactical undersuit issued to Brotherhood Knights operating without power armor. This combat-ready garment provides flexibility and basic environmental protection while allowing full range of motion for extended field operations.

ThingDef.label: BoS Officer Undersuit
ThingDef.description: Elite undersuit worn by Brotherhood Paladins operating in the field without power armor. Constructed from advanced materials, this uniform offers superior protection and comfort while maintaining the professional appearance expected of Brotherhood officers.

ThingDef.label: BoS Battle Coat
ThingDef.description: A sturdy military coat worn by Brotherhood officers. The coat features the Brotherhood's insignia and is designed to withstand the rigors of combat while maintaining a professional appearance.

ThingDef.label: BoS Lancer Captain Uniform
ThingDef.description: A formal dress uniform worn by Lancer Captains of the Brotherhood of Steel. The uniform features gold braiding and ceremonial shoulder boards, marking the wearer as an officer of the Brotherhood's air fleet.

ThingDef.label: BoS Bomber Jacket
ThingDef.description: A leather flight jacket worn by Brotherhood pilots and Vertibird crew members. The jacket features the Brotherhood's gear and sword emblem and provides protection during flight operations.

ThingDef.label: BoS Brotherhood Fatigues
ThingDef.description: Standard-issue field uniform of the Brotherhood of Steel. These durable fatigues are worn by enlisted personnel and junior officers during daily operations and provide basic protection against environmental hazards.

ThingDef.label: BoS Brotherhood Field Medic Fatigues
ThingDef.description: Specialized medical uniform worn by Brotherhood field medics. The fatigues feature additional pockets for medical supplies and are designed to resist contamination during treatment of wounded personnel.

ThingDef.label: BoS Field Scribe Uniform
ThingDef.description: Field uniform worn by Brotherhood Scribes assigned to research missions outside the safety of Brotherhood facilities. The uniform combines scholarly tradition with practical field requirements.

ThingDef.label: BoS Science Scribe Outfit
ThingDef.description: Laboratory attire worn by Science Scribes of the Brotherhood of Steel. The clean, white coat is designed for work with dangerous pre-war technology and experimental equipment.

ThingDef.label: BoS Scribe Robes
ThingDef.description: Hooded robes worn by Brotherhood Scribes during formal ceremonies. These robes represent the scholarly traditions of the Scribe order and their dedication to preserving technological knowledge.

ThingDef.label: BoS Squire Uniform
ThingDef.description: Training uniform worn by Brotherhood Squires. This practical outfit is designed for combat training and education while marking the wearer's junior status within the Brotherhood hierarchy.

ThingDef.label: BoS B35C Armor
ThingDef.description: A vacuum-sealed asbestos jumpsuit covering the entire body. Its purpose is twofold: it allows the user to actually operate the armor and protect soft tissue from moving parts inside the suit and heat. Unlike the BOS uniform, the Recon Armor provides decent protection on its own and is often used by Brotherhood agents on scouting missions or other situations where the clunky and loud power armor would draw too much attention.

ThingDef.label: BoS Reinforced Combat Armor
ThingDef.description: Enhanced combat armor upgraded with Brotherhood of Steel technology. This armor retains the design of the original while incorporating improved protection and environmental sealing systems.

ThingDef.label: BoS Light Combat Armor
ThingDef.description: Light combat armor bearing Brotherhood of Steel markings. This field-proven armor combines pre-war design with Brotherhood modifications, offering solid protection while maintaining mobility for reconnaissance and patrol operations.

ThingDef.label: BoS Sturdy Combat Armor
ThingDef.description: Sturdy combat armor upgraded with Brotherhood technology. This reinforced armor provides excellent protection for Knights operating in high-threat environments, balancing defensive capability with operational mobility.

ThingDef.label: BoS Heavy Combat Armor
ThingDef.description: Heavy combat armor marked with Brotherhood insignia. This top-tier non-powered armor offers exceptional protection for veteran Knights and Paladins operating without power armor, approaching the defensive capabilities of lighter power armor variants.

ThingDef.label: BoS Recon Armor
ThingDef.description: Lightweight tactical armor used by Brotherhood reconnaissance units. The Recon Armor provides solid protection while maintaining mobility and stealth capabilities, making it ideal for scouting missions and situations where full power armor would be impractical. Features advanced composite materials and integrated sensor systems.

ThingDef.label: BoS Outcast Scribe Robes
ThingDef.description: Functional robes worn by Brotherhood Outcast specialists and technical personnel. These robes feature the distinctive Outcast coloring and insignia, modified for field operations where scholars and engineers work alongside warriors in the pursuit of technological supremacy.

ThingDef.label: BoS Outcast Recon Armor
ThingDef.description: Specialized reconnaissance armor worn by Brotherhood Outcast scouts and advance teams. This armor has been modified with enhanced mobility systems and stealth enhancements, featuring the distinctive Outcast markings and tactical modifications that reflect their more aggressive operational doctrine.
